title: Complete checkout and create an order
description: This verifies that a shopper can check out from the cart and land on a confirmed order summary with an order id.

steps.description: Navigate to the cart
Proceed to checkout
Fill in the shipping details
Fill in the payment details
Submit the checkout form
Verify an order confirmation is displayed
Verify an order id is shown

title: Log in to the admin dashboard and view orders
description: This verifies that an administrator can sign in and open the order management list with protected access to admin data.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the admin orders page
Verify order management data is displayed

title: Sign in and access the account profile
description: This verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and reach their account profile details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user account profile is displayed

title: Persist items added to the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can add a product variant to the cart and later see the same cart contents persisted.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page for a purchasable item
Add a selected product variant to the cart
Open the cart
Reload the cart view
Verify the added item remains in the cart
Verify the cart total is displayed

title: Open a product detail page from catalog browsing
description: This verifies shoppers can reach a product detail view from catalog browsing and see the available variants.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to the product catalog
Open a product from the catalog
Verify the product detail page is displayed
Verify product variants are displayed

title: Update cart quantities and totals
description: This verifies that a shopper can change an item quantity in the cart and see the updated totals reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page for a purchasable item
Add a selected product variant to the cart
Open the cart
Increase the quantity of the item
Verify the cart quantity is updated
Verify the cart totals are recalculated

title: Log in as a partner agent
description: This verifies that a partner agent can sign in and reach the partner app experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the partner app home is displayed

title: Review order history and tracking details
description: This verifies that a customer can open order history, select an order, and view its current status and shipment details.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders page
Open a previously placed order
Verify the order status is displayed
Verify shipment tracking details are displayed

title: Create a partner order for a customer
description: This verifies that a partner agent can create an order for an assigned customer and see the created order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the assigned customers view
Start a new partner order for a customer
Add items to the order
Submit the partner order
Verify the created order confirmation is displayed
Verify the new order appears in the order view

title: Remove items from the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can remove an item from the cart and return to an empty cart state when no items remain.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page for a purchasable item
Add a selected product variant to the cart
Open the cart
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the cart no longer shows the removed item
Verify an empty cart state is displayed

title: Search the catalog in Arabic and open a result
description: This verifies Arabic search returns matching products and lets the shopper open a result detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open search
Search for a valid Arabic term
Open a product from the search results
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: Update an order from the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an administrator can change an order state and see the updated order reflected in the admin list or detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the admin orders page
Select an order to update
Submit the order status change
Verify the order shows the updated state

title: View current loyalty balance
description: This verifies that a signed-in customer can open the loyalty section and see their current points balance.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the loyalty points section
Verify the current loyalty points balance is displayed

title: Redeem loyalty points successfully
description: This verifies that a customer can redeem available loyalty points and see their balance update afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the loyalty points section
Start a points redemption
Select a valid redemption amount
Submit the redemption request
Verify the updated loyalty balance is displayed
Verify a redemption record is displayed

title: View and change the current locale
description: This verifies that a user can view the current locale and switch between Arabic and English with the preference saved after the change.

steps.description: Navigate to the locale settings page
Verify the current locale is displayed
Select Arabic as the locale
Save the locale preference
Verify the interface reflects the selected locale

title: Save a product to the wishlist
description: This verifies that a shopper can add a product to their wishlist and see it appear in their saved items.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog
Open a product detail page
Save the product to the wishlist
Open the wishlist
Verify the saved product is displayed in the wishlist

title: View assigned partner customers
description: This verifies that a partner agent can open the customer list and see assigned customers.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the assigned customers view
Verify assigned customers are displayed

title: View referral code
description: This verifies that a signed-in customer can open referrals and view their personal referral code.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the referrals section
Verify the referral code is displayed

title: Persist wishlist items across navigation
description: This verifies that a shopper can save an item, move elsewhere in the app, and still find it in the wishlist later.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog
Open a product detail page
Save the product to the wishlist
Navigate to the product catalog
Open the wishlist
Verify the previously saved product is still displayed in the wishlist

title: Claim a valid referral code
description: This verifies that a customer can submit a valid referral code and see the referral reward applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the referrals section
Start a referral claim
Fill in a valid referral code
Submit the referral claim
Verify referral attribution is displayed
Verify the referral reward status is displayed

title: Remove an item from the wishlist
description: This verifies that a shopper can remove a previously saved item and see it disappear from their wishlist.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog
Open a product detail page
Save the product to the wishlist
Open the wishlist
Remove the saved item from the wishlist
Verify the wishlist no longer shows the removed item

title: Browse categories and brands in the product catalog
description: This verifies shoppers can view the catalog entry points needed to discover products by category and brand.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to the product catalog
Verify categories are displayed
Verify brands are displayed

title: Share a product through WhatsApp
description: This verifies that a shopper can generate a WhatsApp share action for a product from its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog
Open a product detail page
Start sharing the product through WhatsApp
Verify a WhatsApp share link or message payload is displayed

title: Share an order through WhatsApp
description: This verifies that a customer can generate a WhatsApp share action for an order from an order-related view.

steps.description: Navigate to the order history
Open an order detail page
Start sharing the order through WhatsApp
Verify a WhatsApp share link or message payload is displayed

title: Update a warehouse task status
description: This verifies that a warehouse helper can view pending tasks and mark one as completed with the updated status reflected in the task list.

steps.description: Navigate to the warehouse tasks page
Verify pending fulfillment tasks are displayed
Select a pending task status update
Submit the task status change
Verify the task is shown as completed

title: Reject partner order submission without customer details
description: This verifies that a partner agent sees validation feedback when attempting to create an order without required customer information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the new partner order form
Leave the customer details empty
Submit the partner order
Verify a required customer information validation error is displayed

title: Reject invalid cart quantities
description: This verifies that a shopper cannot set an invalid quantity in the cart and sees validation feedback instead of a changed cart.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page for a purchasable item
Add a selected product variant to the cart
Open the cart
Change the item quantity to an invalid value
Verify a quantity validation error is displayed
Verify the cart quantity is not updated

title: Show validation for incomplete checkout
description: This verifies that a shopper cannot submit checkout with missing required information and sees validation feedback on the form.

steps.description: Navigate to the cart
Proceed to checkout
Submit the checkout form without completing required fields
Verify checkout validation errors are displayed
Verify the order is not created

title: Reject redemption with too few points
description: This verifies that a customer cannot redeem more points than available and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the loyalty points section
Start a points redemption
Select an amount greater than the available balance
Submit the redemption request
Verify a redemption validation error is displayed

title: Reject invalid sign in credentials
description: This verifies invalid credentials are rejected and the user remains unable to access protected account content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the user account profile is not displayed

title: Prevent invalid admin login
description: This verifies that incorrect admin credentials are rejected and no admin session is created.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in an invalid username into the username field
Fill in an invalid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is displayed

title: Handle an invalid category product lookup
description: This verifies the catalog shows a clear error or empty state when a shopper requests products for an invalid category.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to the product catalog
Apply an invalid category filter
Verify a catalog error or empty state is visible

title: Block access to orders the customer does not own
description: This verifies that a customer cannot view another customer's order details and sees access-restricted behavior instead.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders page
Open an order the customer does not own
Verify an access denied or not found state is displayed
Verify order details are not shown

title: Reject an invalid referral code
description: This verifies that a customer sees an error when submitting an invalid or expired referral code.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the referrals section
Start a referral claim
Fill in an invalid referral code
Submit the referral claim
Verify a referral validation error is displayed

title: Handle an invalid wishlist product
description: This verifies that trying to save an invalid product is rejected and no wishlist item is added.

steps.description: Navigate to a page that exposes wishlist actions
Attempt to save an invalid product to the wishlist
Verify a validation or error message is visible
Verify no wishlist item was added

title: Handle warehouse task access restrictions
description: This verifies that an invalid or unauthorized warehouse task update is blocked and the user sees an access or not-found error state.

steps.description: Navigate to the warehouse tasks page
Select a task status update for an unavailable or inaccessible task
Submit the task status change
Verify an access or not-found error state is displayed

title: Show an empty state for no search matches
description: This verifies the search experience clearly indicates when a query returns no matching products.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open search
Search for a term with no matches
Verify an empty search state is visible

title: Reject an unsupported locale
description: This verifies that choosing an unsupported locale is blocked and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the locale settings page
Select an unsupported locale value
Save the locale preference
Verify a locale validation error is displayed

title: Reject an incomplete WhatsApp share request
description: This verifies that an incomplete WhatsApp share attempt is blocked with a visible validation error and no share payload is created.

steps.description: Navigate to a page that exposes WhatsApp sharing
Attempt to share with incomplete details
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify no WhatsApp share link or message payload is displayed
